properties.description: The name of the application.

parameters.description: The class of objects to be counted.
parameters.name: each

direct_parameter.description: The photo library to be opened.

classes.name: application

properties.description: The currently selected media items in the application

properties.description: Returns true if a slideshow is currently running.
properties.name: slideshow running

properties.description: The set of recently deleted media items
properties.name: recently deleted album

classes.description: A media item, such as a photo or video.
classes.name: media item

properties.description: A list of keywords to associate with a media item
properties.name: keywords

properties.description: The name (title) of the media item.
properties.name: name

properties.description: A description of the media item.
properties.name: description

properties.description: Whether the media item has been favorited.
properties.name: favorite

properties.description: The date of the media item
properties.name: date

properties.description: The unique ID of the media item
properties.name: id

properties.description: The height of the media item in pixels.

properties.description: The width of the media item in pixels.

properties.name: altitude

properties.description: The selected media item file size.
properties.name: size

properties.description: The GPS latitude and longitude, in an ordered list of 2 numbers or missing values.  Latitude in range -90.0 to 90.0, longitude in range -180.0 to 180.0.
properties.name: location

classes.description: Base class for collections that contains other items, such as albums and folders
classes.name: container

properties.description: The unique ID of this container.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The name of this container.
properties.name: name

properties.description: This container's parent folder, if any.
properties.name: parent

classes.description: An album. A container that holds media items
classes.name: album

classes.description: A folder. A container that holds albums and other folders, but not media items
classes.name: folder

classes.description: A set of media items that represents a Moment.
classes.name: moment

properties.description: The unique ID of the Moment.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The name of the Moment.
properties.name: name

direct_parameter.description: The list of files to copy.

parameters.description: Skip duplicate checking and import everything, defaults to false.
parameters.name: skip check duplicates

commands.description: Export media items to the specified location as files

direct_parameter.description: The list of media items to export.

commands.name: export

parameters.description: Export the original files if true, otherwise export rendered jpgs. defaults to false.
parameters.name: using originals

commands.description: Duplicate an object.  Only media items can be duplicated
commands.name: duplicate

commands.description: Create a new object.  Only new albums and folders can be created.
commands.name: make

parameters.description: The class of the new object, allowed values are album or folder
parameters.name: new

parameters.description: The name of the new object.
parameters.name: named

parameters.description: The parent folder for the new object.
parameters.name: at

commands.description: Delete an object.  Only albums and folders can be deleted.

direct_parameter.description: The album or folder to delete.

commands.name: delete

commands.description: Add media items to an album.

direct_parameter.description: The list of media items to add.

commands.name: add

commands.description: Display an ad-hoc slide show from a list of media items, an album, or a folder.
commands.name: start slideshow

commands.description: Skip to next slide in currently-playing slideshow.
commands.name: next slide

commands.description: Skip to previous slide in currently-playing slideshow.
commands.name: previous slide

commands.description: Show the image at path in the application, used to show spotlight search results

direct_parameter.description: The full path to the image

commands.name: spotlight

commands.description: search for items matching the search string. Identical to entering search text in the Search field in Photos
commands.name: search
